name: construction contractors processing 5–15 permit applications/month tool
description: For construction contractors processing 5–15 permit applications/month, manual paperwork causes delays in project timelines. We automate the conversion of construction plans into permit application forms instead of manual paperwork and form filling.
problem_solved: Manual conversion of construction plans into permit applications is time-consuming and error-prone.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Manual conversion of construction plans into permit applications is time-consuming and error-prone.
